About: It is about the announcement made by the archangel Gabriel to Mary that she would conceive and bear a son through a virgin birth and become the mother of Jesus Christ, the Messiah and Son of God, marking the Incarnation.

AssociatedWith: It is associated with Marian art in the Catholic Church.

KnownAs: It is known as the Annunciation to the Blessed Virgin Mary.
It is known as the Annunciation of Our Lady.
It is known as the Annunciation of the Lord.
It is known as Lady Day in England.
KnownFor: It is known for being the announcement made by the archangel Gabriel to Mary.
It is known for marking the Incarnation.
MemberOf: It is a member of the eight Great Feasts of the Lord in Eastern Christianity.

PartOf: It is part of the Gospel of Luke.
It is part of the Gospel of Matthew.
It is part of the apocryphal Gospel of James.
UsedAs: It is used as the first part of the prayer Hail Mary.
